title: Kinda Nuggets
description: This datapack rounds out the minecraft worlds variety of nuggets.
body:
This datapack rounds out the minecraft worlds variety of nuggets by implementing Copper Nuggets (Obtainable from drowns or smelting copper items), Diamond Nuggets (Available from smelting all your excess diamond tools) and Netherite Nuggets (Available from smelting all your excess netherite tools).

Netherite nuggets and ingots can also be combined with golden and enchanted golden apples respectively on a smithing table to craft Netherite Apples, improved and vastly stronger variants.

Chicken nuggets can also be crafted and cooked as a new food type, otherwise working the same as normal nuggets!

This pack also comes with spanish translations for all items
